SEARCH

Uses of Package
warzone.controller

Packages that use warzone.controller
Package
Description
warzone.service
 
  • Classes in warzone.controller used by warzone.service
    Class
    Description
    CommonController
    Common controller is for manipulate the welcome and help action
    ContinentController
    Continent controller is for manipulate the continents in the map
    CountryController
    Country controller is for manipulate the countries in the map
    ErrorController
    Error Controller is to manipulate the error informations
    GameplayController
    Gameplay Controller is to manipulate the actions in game play
    MapController
    map controller is to manipulate the map
    NeighborController
    Neighbor Controller is for manipulate the neighbor relationships in map
    StartupController
    startup controller is to manipulate the startup phase in game including add/remove players
